title: senecio masatierrae
benefits: Senecio masatierrae has many benefits, such as its ability to improve cardiovascular health by reducing inflammation and lowering blood pressure, which can lead to a reduced risk of heart disease and stroke. Its antioxidant properties also help to protect against cell damage, potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers and neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Furthermore, the plant has been shown to have anti-inflammatory effects, which can alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and asthma, while also promoting better sleep and improved mental clarity. By incorporating Senecio masatierrae into one's daily routine, individuals may experience a range of benefits that can improve overall quality of life and increase vitality.
parts: Senecio masatierrae has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, which contain sesquiterpene lactones like maslinic acid, and flavonoids like quercetin and isorhapontigenin. The flowers of this plant are also used in traditional medicine and contain sesquiterpene lactones like maslinic acid, as well as triterpenoids like ursolic acid and oleanolic acid. The roots of Senecio masatierrae contain sesquiterpene lactones like 11,13-dihydro-8-epimaslinic acid and flavonoids like rutin and quercetin. The rhizomes and stems of this plant are also used in traditional medicine and contain sesquiterpene lactones like maslinic acid and flavonoids like kaempferol.
side_effects: Senecio masatierrae can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, kidney failure, and gastrointestinal problems, due to the presence of toxic compounds like senecionine and jacobine. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause more severe conditions, including hepatotoxicity and renal toxicity. Additionally, improper use of Senecio masatierrae may trigger allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory issues, in some individuals.
